# Electrical Wiring and Terminal Connections: Field Wiring Procedure for Control Panel and Field Devices

## 适用受众
Installation_Technician

## 写作角度说明
电气接线是安装调试的关键环节。安装技师需要按照电气接线图完成从控制柜到现场设备的电缆敷设和端子接续，确保所有接线牢固、标识清晰，并符合电气安全规范。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Re-terminating field wires after initial energization — due to loose ferrules, incorrect strip length, or wrong wire color — typically adds 2-4 hours of unplanned rework per door panel.

## 参考素材
- Cable routing: segregated routing of power and signal cables (minimum 150 mm separation), cable tray fill ratio ≤50%, cable tie spacing 200 mm maximum
- Wire preparation: ferrules on all stranded conductors, strip length 10-12 mm for terminal blocks, no nicked strands
- Terminal connection: torque to 0.5-0.8 Nm for 0.5-2.5 mm² conductors, verify solid seating before applying torque
- Cable identification: printed labels at both ends per wiring diagram, label machine preferred over handwritten
- Safety requirement: lock-out tag-out (LOTO) before any field wiring work, verify no voltage with multimeter before touching conductors

## 关键词
Electrical Wiring, Terminal Connection, Cable Routing, Field Installation, Wire Ferrule, LOTO Safety
